name: Butter Krumkakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs until light in texture.
2. Gradually add sugar and beat until pale yellow.
3. Melt butter and incorporate it slowly.
4. Stir in flour and vanilla until well blended.
COOKING INSTRUCTIONS:
You will need a krumkake iron, which fits over a 7-inch burner surface (gas or electric). Always use moderate heat.
For each baking session, lightly grease the iron at the start with unsalted butter. No further greasing is needed afterward.
Test the batter's consistency by cooking a teaspoonful first, as it varies based on flour condition. Do not add all the flour called for in the recipe at once.
The iron uses about 1 tablespoon of batter per wafer, which should spread easily over the surface without running when pressed down. If too thin, add more flour.
If any batter spills over, lift the iron and trim excess with a knife along the edge.
Cook each wafer approximately 2 minutes on each side or until lightly colored. Immediately roll in a wooden spoon handle or cone form and fill when cool.
